CreateTbsp.name: DDoS Enhanced Protection Package name
CreateTbsp.lineType: Line type (BGP/BGP_S, representing Standard BGP/Enhanced BGP respectively)
CreateTbsp.reservationLength: Purchase duration (by day: 1-20; by month: 3, 6; by year: 1-3)
CreateTbsp.autoRenewTime: Auto-renewal period, enable auto-renewal when creating TBSP (by month: 1-9; by year: 1-3)
CreateTbsp.autoRenewTimeUnit: Auto-renewal period unit, enable auto-renewal when creating TBSP (MONTH/YEAR)
